description_long: This is a rustic, weathered wooden fence composed of two vertical posts and two horizontal rails. The wood appears aged, with a mottled brown and gray coloration, and the rails are slightly bowed, giving the fence a handmade, irregular look. The surface texture is rough, with visible grain and signs of exposure to the elements, such as discoloration and minor warping. There are no decorative elements or embellishments, and the ends of the posts are flat without any caps. The construction is simple and utilitarian, suitable for marking boundaries or restricting passage in parks, gardens, or along sidewalks. The open design allows visibility and airflow while still serving as a physical barrier.
description: A weathered, rustic wooden fence with two vertical posts and two slightly bowed horizontal rails, showing rough texture and aged coloration.
description_view_0: The fence is seen edge-on, showing the thin profile of the posts and rails with minimal detail visible.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the two vertical posts and two horizontal rails, with the rails slightly bowed and the wood's rough, aged texture visible.
description_view_2: Another edge-on view, similar to view 0, showing the narrow profile of the fence.
description_view_3: A mirrored side view to view 1, again showing the two posts and two rails with their bowed shape and weathered surface.
